text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
Confidential Information
All technical and business information shall remain confidential.
Permitted Use
Information shall only be used for evaluation purposes.
Exceptions
Publicly available information is excluded.
Term
Confidentiality obligations continue for 5 years.
Return of Information
All confidential material shall be returned upon request.
Governing Law
Laws of India apply.

summary.one_line_summary: Moderate-risk NDA with 1 clauses. Minor tweaks are suggested for the 0 flagged areas.
summary.ai_executive_summary: This nda contains 1 clauses. No high or critical risk clauses were flagged inside the document. 8 recommended legal protections are missing, including Governing Law Clause, and Force Majeure Clause. Overall risk score: 37/100. Legal recommendation: Sign After Negotiation.
summary.overall_recommendation: Sign After Negotiation. The contract contains standard terms but has moderate risk areas that should be adjusted.

top_risks.reason: Missing Governing Law. Confidentiality breaches involve complex legal actions; without a defined governing law, pursuing an injunction is extremely complicated.
top_risks.consequences: Add: 'This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.'

top_risks.reason: No Force Majeure protection. If a party is forced to disclose information due to government orders or regulatory disasters, they could technically be held in breach of the NDA.
top_risks.consequences: Add: 'No party shall be in breach for disclosures required by law, regulatory authorities, or orders of competent courts, provided prior notice is given.'

top_risks.reason: No specific dispute resolution mechanism is present, making it difficult to quickly obtain an injunction or damages in the event of a leaks/breach of confidentiality.
top_risks.consequences: Add: 'Any dispute arising out of this NDA shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, with Nagpur designated as the seat.'

top_risks.reason: The agreement lacks a defined duration or survival period, meaning the confidentiality obligations could be deemed indefinite (which courts dislike) or terminate instantly upon contract end.
top_risks.consequences: Add: 'The obligations of confidentiality shall remain in force for a period of 3 years from the date of disclosure, surviving any termination of this agreement.'

top_risks.reason: Missing extension terms, which could lead to confidential discussions continuing after the NDA has expired without active legal protection.
top_risks.consequences: Add: 'The term of this NDA may be extended in writing by mutual consent to cover ongoing discussions.'

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
Confidential Information
All technical and business information shall remain confidential.
Permitted Use
Information shall only be used for evaluation purposes.
Exceptions
Publicly available information is excluded.
Term
Confidentiality obligations continue for 5 years.
Return of Information
All confidential material shall be returned upon request.
Governing Law
Laws of India apply.
clauses.reason: No issues identified. Clause conforms to standard legal templates.
clauses.explanation: Unbalanced or permanent confidentiality clauses expose your business to litigation if standard business details are shared. Employees and contractors could face injunctions or damages.
clauses.rewrite:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
Confidential Information
All technical and business information shall remain confidential.
Permitted Use
Information shall only be used for evaluation purposes.
Exceptions
Publicly available information is excluded.
Term
Confidentiality obligations continue for 5 years.
Return of Information
All confidential material shall be returned upon request.
Governing Law
Laws of India apply.
clauses.negotiation_advice: Insist that confidentiality obligations be reciprocal. Ensure there are standard exceptions (e.g., information that is already public, received from a third party, or required to be disclosed by law). Limit the survival period to 2-3 years post-termination.
indian_law: Indian Contract Act, 1872 — Section 27 (Restraint of Trade / Survival)

missing_protections.name: Governing Law Clause
missing_protections.why_missing: Missing Governing Law. Confidentiality breaches involve complex legal actions; without a defined governing law, pursuing an injunction is extremely complicated.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.'

missing_protections.name: Force Majeure Clause
missing_protections.why_missing: No Force Majeure protection. If a party is forced to disclose information due to government orders or regulatory disasters, they could technically be held in breach of the NDA.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'No party shall be in breach for disclosures required by law, regulatory authorities, or orders of competent courts, provided prior notice is given.'

missing_protections.name: Dispute Resolution & Jurisdiction
missing_protections.why_missing: No specific dispute resolution mechanism is present, making it difficult to quickly obtain an injunction or damages in the event of a leaks/breach of confidentiality.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'Any dispute arising out of this NDA shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, with Nagpur designated as the seat.'

missing_protections.name: NDA Duration / Expiry Notice
missing_protections.why_missing: The agreement lacks a defined duration or survival period, meaning the confidentiality obligations could be deemed indefinite (which courts dislike) or terminate instantly upon contract end.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'The obligations of confidentiality shall remain in force for a period of 3 years from the date of disclosure, surviving any termination of this agreement.'

missing_protections.name: Renewal / Term Extension Option
missing_protections.why_missing: Missing extension terms, which could lead to confidential discussions continuing after the NDA has expired without active legal protection.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'The term of this NDA may be extended in writing by mutual consent to cover ongoing discussions.'

missing_protections.name: Return of Confidential Materials
missing_protections.why_missing: No clause mandates the return or destruction of confidential files, allowing the receiving party to retain local copies of sensitive code, designs, or data indefinitely.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'Upon written request, the receiving party shall return or destroy all physical and digital copies of confidential materials within 10 days.'

missing_protections.name: Breach Indemnification Clause
missing_protections.why_missing: No indemnity is specified for confidentiality breaches. If the receiving party leaks proprietary trade secrets, the disclosing party has to prove actual damages in court, which is highly difficult.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'The receiving party shall indemnify the disclosing party for any direct losses, damages, or legal expenses arising from an unauthorized disclosure of confidential info.'

missing_protections.name: Limitation of Liability (NDA)
missing_protections.why_missing: No liability cap is present. While disclosures should have strong remedies, a receiving party faces unlimited punitive damages for accidental or non-willful disclosures.
missing_protections.remedy: Add: 'Except in cases of gross negligence or willful disclosure, the total liability under this NDA shall be capped at a reasonable mutually agreed sum.'
